welcome_desc: Experience seamless political awareness at your fingertips, with smart tools to help you stay informed, educated, and engaged.
engage_desc: Stay informed and connected with the latest political updates.
join_desc: Be a part of SJB. Together, we can win!
terms_text: By registering, you confirm that you provide accurate details and understand that your data is used only for legitimate purposes. We value transparency and integrity in handling your information.
privacy_text: We ensure that your data is kept safe and never shared with third parties. Your privacy is protected at all times, and you can request updates or removal of your information.
i_agree_privacy: I agree to the Privacy Policy
please_select_date: Please select day, month, and year
please_agree_terms_privacy: Please agree to both Terms and Privacy Policy

membership_terms_text: I accept the membership terms and conditions and the Constitution of Samagi Jana Balavegaya. I wish the Party to communicate with me by phone, SMS, email, and other means. I am above 15 years of age and not a member of any other political party.

connect_social_desc: Link your social accounts to enhance your experience and stay connected.
enter_nic_wa: Enter your NIC and WhatsApp number to get started.
